feed.title: SAP Community - SAP BW/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP BW/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Posting date, document date and entry date in Infocube creation
entry.content:
HiI want to create an infocube for sales profitability. I need important dates like document date, posting date and entry date. Where do I put these date fields ? should I map any of these to 0Calday or should I create a date dimension and put all the dates in it ?

thanks.

entry.title: Handling Date Logic in SAC and SAP BW
entry.content:
Hey! Currently I'm trying to figure out a way to handle date logic in SAC when using a model from a Live Connection to a BW. We use BW queries as data models in the SAC. For those queries we created customer exits to handle the logic for the month, our customer wants the months to switch on the 25th. For example:

On 24th of Mar, the Customer Exit gives Jan as output. On 25th of Mar, the Customer Exit gives Feb as output.

But for some widgets in the SAC, such as diagramms with showing a numerical keyfigure, we need to show the deviation to the previous year. But afaik SAC requires using a time dimension with a virtual time hierarchy for that and a single time filter in the widget, to be able to select the deviation from the current to the previous time interval. 

How can we recreate the logic with the 25th of a day for that case? How do you normally handle dates in the interaction of SAC with BW, when there is a custom logic for the month that is to be shown?

I'm thankful for every helpful comment and investigation, thanks!

entry.title: Unknown Job added to Process Chain and unable to delete the step
entry.content:
After updating process chain in Dev we moved it to Quality and now in quality we see one "Unknown job"(only in change mode). Referred few threads but nothing helped  and in one blog they mentioned below link has answer but its not accessible. Can somebody answer?

https://scn.sap.com/thread/1270983

entry.title: Step-by-Step Migration from SAP BW 7.5 to SAP BW/4HANA 2023 – with ECC 6.0 as Source System
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

We are currently running SAP BW 7.5 and have plans to migrate to SAP BW/4HANA 2023. Our strategy is to perform the migration step by step and module by module. Additionally, our SAP ECC 6.0 EHP8 system will continue to serve as a source system during this process.

I have a few questions regarding this migration and integration scenario:

  1. Module-by-Module Migration:

    • What are the recommended practices for migrating individual modules from BW 7.5 to BW/4HANA without disrupting the overall data flow?
    • Are there any known challenges or considerations when migrating data models, queries, and extraction processes module by module?

  2. Integration with ECC 6.0 as a Source:

    • What are the best approaches for integrating our ECC 6.0 system as a data source during and after the migration?
    • Can we continue using standard extractors and ODP configurations during this phased migration?

  3. Best Practices & Tools:

    • Are there specific SAP Notes, guides, or tools you recommend for a smooth transition from BW 7.5 to BW/4HANA in a step-by-step manner?
    • What are the performance considerations or strategies to mitigate any potential downtime or data inconsistencies during the migration process?

Any shared experiences, resources, or guidance on this phased migration approach would be greatly appreciated. Thank you in advance for your insights!

Best regards,
Amir

entry.title: Need calweek based on 0Posting date in composite provider
entry.content:
Hi All,

I need calweek filed based on 0posting date object in composite provider.

can you please let me know the possible ways we can achive.

Regards,

Subbu

entry.title: Save and Upload Edited Analysis for Office Workbooks via FTP / Email
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have a requirement where I need your support. In our BW/4HANA system, we will be creating reports that will be built in Analysis for Office using BPC. These AfO workbooks consist of multiple BW queries, have a very specific layout, and are partially created with BEx formulas.

Now we have the following requirement: The end users should be able to edit these workbooks, save them under a specific name, and then upload them via FTP to a server. My idea is to perform this entire process within an Analysis for Office workbook.

Do you see any possibility to achieve this directly from Analysis for Office? Is there any software that offers such functionality?

Best regards,
Rafael

entry.title: BTP application writing to on-premise HANA database table / Datasphere HANA database table
entry.content:
Hello,

We have some BTP developers creating an app that would write to an on-premise HANA database table (this database is used in for BW/4HANA).

We eventually want to migrate the BTP app to write to a Datasphere table. 

Is there a connection framework where we can easily switch the BTP app from writing to the on-premise HANA database table to writing to the Datasphere table?

Thanks.

Regards,

Mel Calucin

entry.title: SAP DBTech JDBC: [403]: internal error: Cannot get remote source objects:
entry.content:
Hello Experts!

While connecting the remote source system, S4_HANA_SDA connect timeout expired error occur. 

Here is the error details.

 Thanks in advance

entry.title: Create an error dtp on a non-cumulative cube
entry.content:
Hi guys

It is possilbe to create an error DTP for a non a non-cumulative cube?.

I'm extracting data from a non cumulative ADSO to another non cumulative ADSO, however I'm getting the following error:  

Time inconsistency detected for record 999999

Message number: RSDSO_UPDATE006

So my idea was create an error DTP to catch the incorrect record.  Any advise?

Regards Oscar

entry.title: Re: Create an error dtp on a non-cumulative cube
entry.content:
I got it thanks.

The transformation that DTP uses had a HANA runtime with somo ABAP Code in the end rutine, that was the reason I was not able to create an error DTP.  I change the runtime to ABAP create again the ABAP end routine and that did the trick.

Regards Oscar

entry.title: BW4HANA Open ODS view - master data
entry.content:
Hi all,

how does the Open ODS view for master data work? We are trying to use it as a time-dependet infoobject. But here is the problem. The valid period is set by time-stamp fields. When we asociate this Open ODS view with Open ODS view facts it shows empty values for the infoobject. As soon as we move the valid period fields from valid period folder to characteristics folder (aka attributes), data is showing. I tried to find something on the net, but there is not much info about it. I found only this:

  • Key date-based access to time-dependent master data is not supported in the Open ODS views

I dont understand this. How is it not supported? What is the point of having a valid period folder in the open ods view for master data? How does it work? Can anyone explain it? Maybe the time-stamp field is the problem? And we should change it to calday?

Best regards,

Martin Zluky

entry.title: Process chain run into error with Error in remote call of destination DB-Error - -10807
entry.content:
Dear  all，

we have suffering the process chain run into error those days, today the PC raise error "Error in remote call of destination PS1CLNT800: 

I am finding solutions that can automatically repeat process chain or is there any setting can make the connection retry 3times or reconnection ODP?

Appraciate any suggestions.

Regards,

Fanny

entry.title: BW Bridge: DTP Filter doesn't fetch any records but there is data to be processed
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I have a data flow from one standard ADSO to another standard ADSO via an InfoSource. Both transformations have SQLScript Expert Routines. I went ahead and created a full DTP with a filter on 0CALMONTH. When I run the DTP, no data is retrieved nor processed. If I run the full DTP without a filter, the load runs fine. I'm sure the source has data for the selection because I'm able to see records for the same filter selection in the HANA Database Explorer. If I create an intermediate ADSO to "stage" the data inbetween, both transformations routines run fine and are able to load data to and from the intermediate ADSO. Any ideas what might be causing the issue with the InfoSource flow?

 

EDIT: I added a screenshot of the DTP Monitor

entry.title: Eclipse IDE (SAP BW/HANA) Problems In Linux
entry.content:
Hi This has been a problem for a very long time. Since I started using Fedora which is 4 years ago.

I use Eclipse for SAP BW on HANA. Mainly use it to maintain HANA based objects. However, I did find weird issues. Example below.

We maintain composite providers and map to out. When I do this on windows eclipse I see the mapping as below. This is how it suppose to be.

 
 

However on Fedora (Linux) version I dont.

Any ideas to resolve this problem?

Eclipse and Java version

Note: I have tried using all sorts of Java versions, include SAPMachine which is based on Open Java

entry.title: BW cockpit is not working
entry.content:
Hello Team,

After upgrade BW Cockpit is not working properly i have tried all the objects like ADSO"s, Info object etc. it is giving the issue find the attached screen short for the same and help.

 

Thanks and Regards,

Venkat.

entry.title: BW-IP mit BW/4HANA
entry.content:
In wie fern ist BW-IP unter BW/4HANA noch nutzbar? Leider finde ich keine konkreten bzw. offiziellen Informationen dazu. Aus diversen SAP-Blogeinträgen konnte ich zwar die Info entnehmen, dass BW-IP unter BW/4 technisch funktioniert, es aber im Gegensatz früheren BW-Versionen zur Nutzung eine BPC-Lizenz braucht.

Ich bin nun auf der Suche nach einem offiziellen Dokument (Roadmap, PAM, Hinweis oder Dokumentation), auf welches ich verweisen kann.

entry.title: Executing OData over BW Query pass back an error 400 for a non mandatory variable
entry.content:
Hello to all of you!

When I am executing an OData service exposing BW Query I include all the variables - the non-mandatory I leave empty like X_0Material='', but about the mandatory one I pass a parameter like X_0Fiscper='001.2025'. Unfortunately for Calday's variable, which is optional it returns error - status code 400 and more precisely "Invalid key predicate type . Expected type is 'Edm.DateTime' ".
I tried with /Date('') and all the variances but it doesn't recognize it.

Every assistance is appreciated.
Thank you in advance!

entry.title: DTIS Table inconsistent
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I just updated to BW/4HANA, everything is proceeding correctly except for the following ADSO which I can't activate due to the following error:

I also tried running the program: RSDTIS_CLEANUP but nothing, it doesn't work.

Could anyone help me?

 

Best Regards

 

Francesco

entry.title: BW-MT Transformation lookup rule with compounded objects
entry.content:
when editing a transformation which contain a lookup rule for compounded objects, the compounding field disappears after saving TRFN in eclipse and can only be added by re-creating the lookup rule.

 

Has anybody an better solution?

entry.title: Upgrading BW/4HANA 2.0 / BPC 11.1 to BW/4HANA 2023 / BPC 2021
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

We are getting started with an upgrade from BW/4HANA 2.0 with BPC 11.1 to BW/4HANA 2023 with BPC 2021 and I am struggling to find good content in regards to what needs to be done on the BPC side of things. Has anyone gone through this upgrade yet that could shine some light? Are there any special steps in regards to BPC? Do we need to uninstall the BPC 11.1 add-on? Do we need to export the environments and import them again? We use both Standard and Embedded solutions. 

 

Thanks in advance,

Cristina
